summary: Attribution + Checkout Campaign Application Pack testing completed. All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - CheckoutPage, AffiliatePerkPreviewBox component working correctly. Fixed React hooks error in CreativeServiceCheckoutPage.jsx.

checkout_affiliate_perk_evaluation.notes: Returns eligibility status and discount details. Shows 'No perk configured' when no perks set up.

checkout_detect_attribution.notes: Detects affiliate code from URL query params or cookies

guest_order_with_affiliate_code.notes: Accepts affiliate_code, affiliate_email in payload. Order records attribution data.

guest_order_with_campaign_discount.notes: Accepts campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_discount, campaign_reward_type fields

affiliate_perk_preview.notes: Validates affiliate code and returns perk eligibility

checkout_page_ui.notes: Displays cart items, order summary, AffiliatePerkPreviewBox component

affiliate_perk_preview_box_ui.notes: Affiliate code input, Apply button, error/success messages all working with data-testids

fix_applied.issue: React hooks called after early return (violates Rules of Hooks)
fix_applied.fix: Moved useEffect hooks before the early return, added null checks inside hooks

critical_code_review_comments: All new checkout endpoints properly use module-level db connection
GuestOrderCreate model correctly accepts all attribution fields
Frontend correctly integrates AffiliatePerkPreviewBox in CheckoutPage and CreativeServiceCheckoutPage
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with unique email addresses (prefixed with test_, affiliate_test_, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attribution + Checkout Campaign Pack fully implemented and tested. Checkout endpoints work correctly. AffiliatePerkPreviewBox shows 'No perk configured' when no customer perks are set up in affiliate settings - this is expected behavior. To test with actual perks, configure customer perks in /admin/affiliate-settings.
